name: GetBusNameContext
title: GetBusNameContext
description: Returns the context of the specified bus.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the bus.The bus name can be taken from the CANoe Simulation Setup:

return:
In the case of success, the context of the specified bus is returned.
If the specified bus does not exist, 0 is returned.

description: This is an example for a simulation node.Test nodes should copy the bus context to a CAPL variable in the Main() function because all global variables are cleared when a test module is started.
